diagrams.title: Complete Graph K5
diagrams.description: A complete graph with 5 vertices where every pair of distinct vertices is connected by a unique edge
diagrams.purpose: Understanding complete graphs and maximum edges in simple graphs

diagrams.title: Bipartite Graph K3,3
diagrams.description: Complete bipartite graph with partitions of 3 vertices each, showing edges only between partitions
elements: 9 edges connecting every left vertex to every right vertex
No edges within left set or within right set
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing bipartite structure and understanding partition-based graphs

diagrams.title: Weighted Graph Shortest Path
diagrams.description: Network of 5 cities connected by roads with distance weights, demonstrating shortest path problem
elements: Total weight calculation for each path
diagrams.purpose: Understanding weighted graphs and shortest path computation

diagrams.title: Graph Representations Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing same graph in adjacency matrix and adjacency list forms
elements: Four lists showing neighbors of each vertex
diagrams.purpose: Understanding different ways to represent graphs in memory
